change_scope: No production-code patch is prescribed. Repair belongs to local/CI PostgreSQL availability for spec/rails_helper.rb and the final model runtime gate.
targets.acceptance_signal: bundle exec rspec spec/models/source_spec.rb spec/models/sync_checkpoint_spec.rb exits 0.

change_scope: Future reprocess of historical issues should either split downstream tests/methods by feature ownership or mark mixed files as shared carriers explicitly.
do_not_touch: Current production logic of sync_step! without a separate issue-level spec/plan review
targets.acceptance_signal: Feature-level review no longer has to infer ownership for downstream behavior from mixed files.

global_constraints: Do not patch production code just to silence an environment-level DB blocker.
Do not pretend mixed file ownership is clean feature isolation.
Treat the remaining blocker as process/runtime debt, not as a proven logic defect in the persistence slice.
